Bouncy Castle Rentals in Lunenburg NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater and serves Lunenburg by availability and travel quote with premium bouncy castles, combo inflatables, games, and event add-ons.

Travel cost, setup suitability, and availability are confirmed before any Lunenburg booking is finalized.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, By quote, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Crown Dino Combo - Combo Inflatable, $279, Dry-use - Dinosaur-themed combo inflatable with bounce and slide fun.
  • Crown Cascade - Water Slide, $319, Wet-use - Colourful water slide for splash-ready summer fun.

Best For

  • Lunenburg birthdays
  • School events
  • Summer parties
  • Community celebrations

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you deliver to Lunenburg?
Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater and serves Lunenburg by availability and travel quote. Booking is not confirmed until travel and setup details are reviewed.
Are bookings confirmed after submitting an online request?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit details before any booking is finalized.
What is included with every rental?
Delivery, setup, and takedown are included with every rental. The blower stays powered during use. Travel fees apply based on distance from Bridgewater.
What is the wind limit for inflatables?
Inflatables must not be used when sustained winds exceed 38 km/h. Use must stop immediately if winds reach or exceed this limit.
